item.enigmatic_gems.stalwart_gem.desc1: 10% chance to drop when killing an Iron Golem
item.enigmatic_gems.stalwart_gem.desc2: Provides Resistance I when in hotbar
item.enigmatic_gems.red_gem.desc1: kill witch for get the gem(5%)
item.enigmatic_gems.fire_gem.desc1: kill blaze or zoglin for get this gem(8%)
item.enigmatic_gems.fire_gem.desc2: provides FIRE RESISTANCE when in hotbar
item.enigmatic_gems.anti_poison_gem.desc: 10% chance to drop when killing a Cave Spider
Provides Poison immunity when in hotbar
item.enigmatic_gems.echo_gem.desc1: use 8 echo shards and 1 Stalwart Gem to craft this gem
item.enigmatic_gems.echo_gem.desc2: Provides Darkness immunity when in hotbar and Resistance II
item.enigmatic_gems.gem_of_concealment.d: kill the Wandering Trader to get this gem(5%)
enable player to breathe under water
kill Elder Guardian to get this gem
item.enigmatic_gems.night_vision_gem.des: provide NIGHT VISION when in hotbar
use Eye Of Phantom to craft this gem in the stonecutter
